migration.semantic_test: With synthetic KeyW+ShiftLeft input and a fake pointer lock, _footstepT=0 fires immediately and rearms to sprint interval 0.26; the next 0.1s tick decays it to 0.16. Above conditions false clamps _footstepT to 0 (test_legacy_bridge.mjs iter-783 phase).
migration.native_test: src/ankhor/facets/footstep_sound.js reproduces sprint interval rearm, countdown, inactive clamp, and SFX action payload on hero.inventory state (test_legacy_bridge.mjs native footstep phase).
